mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_TASK ( projectNo, creatorNo, title, description, status, priority, dueDate, parentTaskNo, sortOrder, createdDt, updatedDt ) VALUES (#{projectNo}, #{creatorNo}, #{request.title}, #{request.description}, 'TODO', COALESCE(#{request.priority}, 'MEDIUM'), #{request.dueDate}, #{request.parentTaskNo}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE SAAS_TASK SET status = 'DONE', completedDt = NOW(), updatedDt = NOW() WHERE taskNo = #{taskNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_TASK_COMMENT (taskNo, memberNo, content, parentCommentNo, createdDt, updatedDt) VALUES (#{taskNo}, #{memberNo}, #{request.content}, #{request.parentCommentNo}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE SAAS_TASK SET title = #{request.title}, description = #{request.description}, priority = #{request.priority}, dueDate = #{request.dueDate}, assigneeNo = #{request.assigneeNo}, updatedDt = NOW() WHERE taskNo = #{taskNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL
UPDATE SAAS_TASK SET sortOrder = #{sortOrder}, updatedDt = NOW() WHERE taskNo = #{taskNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL
UPDATE SAAS_TASK SET status = #{request.status}, updatedDt = NOW() WHERE taskNo = #{taskNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL
UPDATE SAAS_TASK_COMMENT SET content = #{request.content}, updatedDt = NOW() WHERE commentNo = #{commentNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL
UPDATE SAAS_TASK SET deletedDt = NOW(), updatedDt = NOW() WHERE taskNo = #{taskNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL
UPDATE SAAS_TASK_COMMENT SET deletedDt = NOW(), updatedDt = NOW() WHERE commentNo = #{commentNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL
UPDATE SAAS_TASK_COMMENT SET deletedDt = NOW(), updatedDt = NOW() WHERE taskNo = #{taskNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT ST.taskNo, ST.projectNo, ST.creatorNo, SC.nickname AS creatorNickname, ST.assigneeNo, SA.nickname AS assigneeNickname, ST.title, ST.description, ST.status, ST.priority, ST.dueDate, ST.parentTaskNo, ST.sortOrder, ST.createdDt, ST.updatedDt, ST.deletedDt, ST.completedDt FROM SAAS_TASK ST JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SC ON SC.memberNo = ST.creatorNo LEFT JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SA ON SA.memberNo = ST.assigneeNo WHERE ST.parentTaskNo = #{parentTaskNo} AND ST.deletedDt IS NULL ORDER BY ST.createdDt DESC

SELECT ST.taskNo, ST.projectNo, ST.creatorNo, SC.nickname AS creatorNickname, ST.assigneeNo, SA.nickname AS assigneeNickname, ST.title, ST.description, ST.status, ST.priority, ST.dueDate, ST.parentTaskNo, ST.sortOrder, ST.createdDt, ST.updatedDt, ST.deletedDt, ST.completedDt FROM SAAS_TASK ST JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SC ON SC.memberNo = ST.creatorNo LEFT JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SA ON SA.memberNo = ST.assigneeNo WHERE ST.taskNo = #{taskNo} AND ST.deletedDt IS NULL

SELECT ST.taskNo, ST.projectNo, ST.creatorNo, SC.nickname AS creatorNickname, ST.assigneeNo, SA.nickname AS assigneeNickname, ST.title, ST.description, ST.status, ST.priority, ST.dueDate, ST.parentTaskNo, ST.sortOrder, ST.createdDt, ST.updatedDt, ST.deletedDt, ST.completedDt FROM SAAS_TASK ST JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SC ON SC.memberNo = ST.creatorNo LEFT JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SA ON SA.memberNo = ST.assigneeNo WHERE ST.projectNo = #{projectNo} AND ST.deletedDt IS NULL AND ST.parentTaskNo IS NULL ORDER BY ST.sortOrder ASC, ST.createdDt DESC

SELECT ST.taskNo, ST.projectNo, ST.creatorNo, SC.nickname AS creatorNickname, ST.assigneeNo, SA.nickname AS assigneeNickname, ST.title, ST.description, ST.status, ST.priority, ST.dueDate, ST.parentTaskNo, ST.sortOrder, ST.createdDt, ST.updatedDt, ST.deletedDt, ST.completedDt FROM SAAS_TASK ST JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SC ON SC.memberNo = ST.creatorNo LEFT JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SA ON SA.memberNo = ST.assigneeNo WHERE ST.creatorNo = #{creatorNo} AND ST.deletedDt IS NULL ORDER BY ST.createdDt DESC

SELECT ST.taskNo, ST.projectNo, ST.creatorNo, SC.nickname AS creatorNickname, ST.assigneeNo, SA.nickname AS assigneeNickname, ST.title, ST.description, ST.status, ST.priority, ST.dueDate, ST.parentTaskNo, ST.sortOrder, ST.createdDt, ST.updatedDt, ST.deletedDt, ST.completedDt FROM SAAS_TASK ST JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SC ON SC.memberNo = ST.creatorNo LEFT JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SA ON SA.memberNo = ST.assigneeNo WHERE ST.assigneeNo = #{assigneeNo} AND ST.deletedDt IS NULL AND ST.status != 'DONE' ORDER BY ST.dueDate ASC, ST.createdDt DESC

SELECT STC.commentNo, STC.taskNo, STC.memberNo, SM.nickname AS memberNickname, STC.content, STC.parentCommentNo, STC.createdDt, STC.updatedDt, STC.deletedDt FROM SAAS_TASK_COMMENT STC JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = STC.memberNo WHERE STC.taskNo = #{taskNo} AND STC.deletedDt IS NULL ORDER BY STC.parentCommentNo ASC, STC.createdDt ASC
SELECT memberNo FROM SAAS_TASK_COMMENT WHERE commentNo = #{commentNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL
